signals.headline: Cooper Flagg overtakes Kon Knueppel as ROY odds favorite after 96-point weekend
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg overtakes Kon Knueppel as ROY odds favorite after 96-point weekend.** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

Flagg's odds shifted to -250 on DraftKings after scoring 51 points Friday vs. Orlando Magic and 45 points (near triple-double) Sunday vs. Lakers, passing Knueppel's +180; he leads rookies in scoring (20.8 PPG), ranks high in rebounds/assists, and joins historic company like Jordan, Bird,
